# SecurePulse

> AI-powered cyber security & code integrity auditor. Paste code or upload files to scan for OWASP Top 10, CWE, and secret exposure vulnerabilities with automated patch suggestions.

## Pages
- [Scan Dashboard](/dashboard): Run new scans and review audit history.
- [Security Policies](/policies): Toggle compliance standards (OWASP, SANS, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, smart-contract safeguards).
